prompt: Toggle AirDrop visibility between 'Contacts Only' and 'Everyone for 10 minutes'. Fast path: open Control Center > AirDrop, or `cerebellum 'settings open com.apple.preferences.AirDrop'`. The eval reads com.apple.sharingd DiscoverableMode and expects it to differ from the value captured at setup. If your AirDrop UI doesn't allow toggling (e.g. on a Mac with no Wi-Fi), document it.
